summary: Iteration 32 - Comprehensive codebase audit testing complete. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all key features working: Homepage shows 70 IPL 2026 matches, Pre-match page displays weather card with real-time Open-Meteo data, Match Info sidebar with city/time/status, 10-category algorithm prediction breakdown, Re-Predict button, Claude Analysis button. Live match page shows Fetch Live Scores and Check Status buttons. Weather API (Open-Meteo) working without API key. News API (DuckDuckGo) endpoint functional but may return empty due to rate limits.

minor.issue: DuckDuckGo news search may return empty results due to rate limiting from container IP - this is expected behavior

issues: News results showing 'Royal Caribbean Cruises' instead of cricket news - DuckDuckGo search returning unrelated results

passed_tests: Backend: API health check returns version 4.1.0
Backend: GET /api/schedule returns 70 matches
Backend: Schedule matches have required fields (city, timeIST, venue, team1, team2)
Backend: First match is RCB vs SRH in Bengaluru
Backend: POST /api/schedule/seed-official?force=true loads 70 matches from official PDF
Backend: GET /api/weather/Mumbai returns weather data with available=true
Backend: GET /api/weather/Bengaluru returns weather data
Backend: GET /api/matches/ipl2026_001/weather returns weather with cricket_impact
Backend: GET /api/matches/ipl2026_001/news returns news articles endpoint
Backend: GET /api/matches/ipl2026_001/state returns match info with city, timeIST
Backend: GET /api/matches/ipl2026_020/state returns match info
Backend: GET /api/predictions/ipl2026_001/pre-match returns cached prediction
Backend: POST /api/matches/ipl2026_020/pre-match-predict generates fresh prediction
Backend: Pre-match prediction includes category breakdown
Backend: POST /api/matches/{match_id}/fetch-live endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/matches/{match_id}/refresh-claude-prediction endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/matches/{match_id}/check-status endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/matches/refresh-live-status discovers live matches
Backend: GET /api/predictions/upcoming returns predictions list
Backend: GET /api/matches/{match_id}/claude-analysis returns cached analysis
Frontend: Homepage loads with 70 matches displayed
Frontend: All 10 IPL teams visible on homepage (RCB, CSK, MI, KKR, SRH, DC, PBKS, GT, LSG, RR)
Frontend: Pre-match page loads with data-testid='pre-match-page'
Frontend: Pre-match title shows team names (RCB vs SRH)
Frontend: Match Info sidebar shows city, time (IST), status
Frontend: Weather Conditions card shows temperature, humidity, wind, rain
Frontend: Cricket Impact section shows weather effect on play
Frontend: Re-Predict button found and functional
Frontend: Go Live button found
Frontend: Claude Analysis button found
Frontend: Live match page loads with data-testid='live-match-page'
Frontend: Fetch Live Scores button found
Frontend: Check Status button found
action_items: Consider improving DuckDuckGo news search query to get more relevant cricket news results (currently showing unrelated 'Royal Caribbean' results)
critical_code_review_comments: Weather service (Open-Meteo) working correctly without API key - good implementation
Schedule data correctly seeded from official PDF with 70 matches
Pre-match prediction includes 10-category breakdown with proper weights
Live predictor uses alpha-blended H×L model as documented
All data-testid attributes present for testing
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule (70 matches from official PDF)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 comprehensive audit complete. All backend APIs working: schedule (70 matches), weather (Open-Meteo), news (DuckDuckGo), pre-match predictions (10-category model), live match endpoints. Frontend displays all components correctly. Weather card shows real-time data with cricket impact assessment. The only minor issue is DuckDuckGo news search returning unrelated results due to search query matching 'Royal' in team names.

weather_api.description: Open-Meteo API returns real-time weather without API key

weather_card_ui.description: Weather card shows temp, humidity, wind, rain, cricket impact

news_api.description: DuckDuckGo news endpoint functional (may return empty/unrelated due to rate limits)

claude_analysis.description: Claude Opus analysis button and endpoint functional

live_match_buttons.description: Fetch Live Scores, Check Status, Refresh Both buttons present

match_info_sidebar.description: Shows city, timeIST, status, match number, series
